figures.caption: Figure 1: Systemic failure modes in deterministic testgeneration architectures. (a) False positives occur when incorrect code satisfies faulty tests. (b) False negatives cause valid logic to be rejected and subsequently degraded to satisfy incorrect assertions.
Figure 3: Ancestral Lineage of a Solution. An illustrative visualization of the BACE co-evolutionary process, tracing the genesis of a candidate solution (𝑐4)
